title.rendered: AMI Hosts Another Successful Aptio V European Summit in Munich, Germany

content.rendered:
NORCROSS, GEORGIA – AMI, Inc. (AMI), a global leader in BIOS, remote management tools, network data storage products and unique solutions based on the Linux® and Android™ operating systems, is pleased to announce the successful conclusion of the 4th annual Aptio® V European Summit in Munich, Germany earlier this week.

The main purpose of the two-day Aptio V European Summit is to increase technological value provided to AMI’s customers and partners. Attendees experience in-depth, engaging and informative seminars to learn about the latest innovations to AMI’s flagship Aptio V UEFI firmware, as well as to dive into the supplementary tools and features that complement Aptio V. These interactive seminars are designed to give attendees a competitive edge in their respective industries by utilizing the most efficient, innovative technology to address the increasing needs and wants of the technology industry.

If you are interested being in on the next Aptio V European Summit from AMI, please contact your AMI representative at 1-800-828-9264 / +1-770-246-8600 or visit ami.com.

Android is a trademark of Google LLC.
